sentences.arabic: تَأَخَّرَ خَالِدٌ عَنِ المَوْعِدِ وَشَعَرَ بِالذَّنْبِ.
sentences.translation: Halid je zakasnio na termin i osjetio se krivim.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid was late for the appointment and felt guilty.

sentences.translation: Nazvao je prijatelja i ispričao mu se.
sentences.translationEn: He called his friend and apologized to him.

sentences.translation: Rekao je da je saobraćaj bio velik.
sentences.translationEn: He said that the traffic was very heavy.

sentences.translation: Prijatelj je prihvatio izvinjenje sa svim razumijevanjem.
sentences.translationEn: His friend accepted the apology wholeheartedly.
